summary: Iteration 71 - My Account Navigation CMS Feature Testing. All 10 test scenarios passed. Backend APIs (public/admin myaccount-nav, visibility toggle, reorder) working correctly. Frontend CMS page shows 13 drag-reorderable rows with toggles. Admin sidebar ordering correct (Security between Membership and System). Admin login button uses CSS variable (green rgb(115,175,95)) instead of hardcoded gold. Member Levels dialog shows all 12 permission checkboxes including 5 new ones.
critical_code_review_comments: MYACCOUNT_NAV_CATALOG in membership.py correctly defines 13 nav items with matching IDs to MyAccountLayout.js
Lazy seeding via seed_myaccount_nav() works correctly - seeds on first GET of either public or admin endpoint
AdminLoginPage.js correctly uses var(--ad-button-bg) CSS variable instead of hardcoded gold
MemberLevelsManager.js SIDEBAR_SECTIONS array includes all 12 permission items (7 original + 5 new)
MyAccountNavManager.js has proper data-testid attributes for all rows and toggles
AdminLayout.js sidebar ordering correct: Membership group → Security divider → System group
seed_data_creation: None - myaccount_nav collection auto-seeded with 13 items on first API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 tested My Account Navigation CMS feature. Collection 'myaccount_nav' has 13 items (snake_case collection, kebab-case item IDs). Admin endpoints require JWT. Public endpoint at /api/public/myaccount-nav returns ordered items. Admin CMS page at /admin/myaccount-nav allows drag-reorder and visibility toggle. Member Levels at /admin/member-levels has 12 permission checkboxes. Admin login button color now uses CSS variable --ad-button-bg.

test_1_public_myaccount_nav.details: Returns 13 ordered items with id, label, order, visible fields

test_3_visibility_toggle.details: visible:false hides item, visible:true shows it

test_5_cms_page.details: 13 rows with data-testid='manav-row-<id>', toggles data-testid='manav-toggle-<id>', Save button data-testid='manav-save-btn'

test_6_member_levels_permissions.details: Add Level dialog shows 12 checkboxes including 5 new: perm-global-calendar, perm-earnings, perm-bundles, perm-my-bookings, perm-calendar-sync

test_7_admin_login_button_color.details: Sign In button background is rgb(115, 175, 95) - NOT hardcoded gold #c9a84c. Uses var(--ad-button-bg)

test_8_sidebar_ordering.details: Security divider appears AFTER Membership Settings and BEFORE Contacts (System group). Verified: Membership Settings idx=36, Roles & Permissions idx=38, Contacts idx=40

test_9_member_public_flow.details: Member carlos@example.com sees sidebar nav filtered by level permissions. 6 items visible based on level permissions.

test_10_regression_permissions.details: Existing permissions (membership-profile, mentorship-profile, my-sponsor, ebank, invite-code, my-community, portfolios) still present in SIDEBAR_SECTIONS
